DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative for one flight to the mainbase provided:

ListItem.Para: The aircraft is not allowed to dispatch from the Mainbase
The flight time does not exceed 1.5 hours
Associated engine ignition systems operate normally.
Airplane is not operated in known or forecast icing conditions.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Lock the inoperative BAI valve in the closed position and if required, do a detailed inspection of the BAI system (AMM DDG 75-11-02).

ListItem.Para: Retract and deactivate the leading edge slats.
Deactivate the associated engine thrust reverser for ground maintenance.
Gain access to the BAI valve.
Lock the BAI valve in the closed position.
For ENG BAI VALVE OPEN L or R status message displayed, perform the BAI System Detailed Inspection.
Activate the associated engine thrust reverser after ground maintenance.
